recent_calls.summary: The user called Budget and provided their ZIP code, then requested parts and asked to speak to a specific operator named CG. The call ended shortly after the user's request without further resolution.
The user called to return a missed phone call and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to confirm that they are not automatically re-enrolled or charged for the Budget Savings Club furnace tune-up service for another year, as they did not want to continue the service. The agent informed the user that they do not have direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

Deborah Singleton called to set up a service request for her cooling system, which is making a humming noise. She provided her contact details and requested service for the same day but had difficulty confirming her exact street address. The call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Angel from American Home Shield called to inquire about the status of a contractor report for dispatch number 47242859 related to Yolanda Griffin. The agent, Sophie, informed Angel that she would pass the request to the appropriate team for follow-up. The call ended with the agent confirming the request would be forwarded and offering further assistance if needed.

Michael Holliday called to schedule a repair appointment for his air conditioner, which is not blowing cold air, under his American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and informed Michael that a technician would contact him soon. Michael declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the call experience.

The user called back after receiving a call from the company, expecting to schedule an appointment for an AC inspection. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, James Patton, called mistakenly thinking it was a repair call. The agent confirmed no appointment was scheduled and offered to transfer him to a live representative, which was done successfully. The user expressed frustration about not knowing if a technician was coming soon.
The user requested to speak to Amy, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

Matt called to report that his air conditioner, which was checked last week with no issues found, is still not cooling properly and runs constantly. The agent confirmed his contact details and service address, assured him the team would follow up promptly, and ended the call after addressing his concerns.
The user called after receiving a missed call from the company. The agent acknowledged the call and transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to schedule an appointment between nine and ten related to their American Home Shield home warranty but did not have their dispatch number. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Jim Shaver called Budget to report a leaking air conditioner in his basement covered by his home warranty. He requested service for anytime today, and the agent confirmed the details and informed him that someone from the team would contact him shortly. Jim declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Ashley from American Home Shield called to schedule an HVAC work order for a system not coming on at a property in Bowling Green, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and informed Ashley that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out shortly. Ashley declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Elaine Riley called to inquire about the timing of an air conditioning service appointment. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which she accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

Emmanuel Cobbs called to request an estimate for a furnace replacement for his over 25-year-old unit that is still working but very old. The agent collected all necessary details, including service address, contact information, and preferred appointment time, and successfully booked an appointment for June 10th between 4 and 6 PM. Emmanuel provided positive feedback with a rating of 4 out of 5.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called Budget to request cooling service at their home in Illinois. The agent collected the user's full name, address, phone number, email, and preferred appointment time, then confirmed the details and informed the user that the team would reach out to confirm the appointment. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information.

The user, Roy Hagan, called to schedule an air conditioning system checkup as part of a maintenance program. The agent confirmed details and booked an appointment for Thursday, June 11th at 8 AM. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback but was satisfied with the service.
The user called and requested to speak to a live agent. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to another live agent.

The user called to clarify an estimate related to AC and furnace repair, expressing a preference for repair over replacement. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to request an emergency air conditioning repair through their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and providing feedback.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another representative. The initial agent facilitated the transfer promptly without any issues.
No conversation happened.

Jody Romke called to report an issue with a wire on their air conditioner not connecting and requested a repair appointment after 6 PM tonight. The agent informed Jody that the earliest available appointments were on Monday, Tuesday, or Wednesday at 4 PM, but Jody emphasized the urgency of the repair. The call ended with Jody requesting the issue be flagged as urgent and then hanging up.
The user requested to speak with customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called and requested to speak with an operator. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to inquire about any work or replacement done on a furnace associated with a dispatch number. The agent could not provide real-time service records but offered to pass the request to the team and then transferred the user to a live representative for further assistance.

The user, Gwen Williams, called to inquire about an estimate for a forty gallon gas water heater and requested to speak with a specialist. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a service team but was informed that exact times could not be confirmed before regular business hours. The agent assured the user that the team would follow up after 8 AM and offered information about maintenance programs, which the user declined. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

The user, Demarcus, called to speak with customer service about an appointment. The agent informed him that live transfers are unavailable before 8 AM and documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended after the agent offered further assistance.

The user, Kara Pokorny, called to schedule a service for an HVAC drainage issue caused by recent plumbing changes. The agent collected details, including service preferences for Thursdays or Fridays, and confirmed contact information. Kara also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the agent assured a follow-up on the next business day.

The user called to inquire about HVAC services and was provided with information about Budget's full-service heating, cooling, and indoor air quality work. The call ended shortly after the user requested more information by pressing a digit.

Vivica called to request a service appointment for her air conditioning unit, which is not running. The agent confirmed the details, including preferred service times and address, and noted that a ladder may be needed. Vivica declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the assistant's service.

The user called to inquire about water heater service charges but mentioned they already arranged for someone to handle it in the morning. The agent provided pricing information and mentioned special offers and financing options for future needs. The call ended with the user thanking the agent and no further assistance requested.

The user inquired about the cost to replace a water heater but declined further assistance after explaining they already have a new air and heating system and were considering other options. The agent offered to have the team contact them with a personalized estimate, but the user decided not to proceed at this time and said they might call back later.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any interaction or information exchange as the user hung up before providing the requested ZIP code.

The user called after hours to schedule air conditioner service as soon as possible. The agent collected updated contact information and confirmed the service address and email, then informed the user that a representative will call back on the next business day. The user declined further assistance and ended the call.
The call was very brief with the user responding only once and then hanging up shortly after the agent's greeting. No specific assistance or information exchange occurred.
The user called Budget's after-hours assistant but hung up shortly after the call started without completing the conversation.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no response from the user before the call ended.

Jody Romke called to report that her air conditioner was not working and requested service as soon as possible. The agent confirmed her contact details, service address, and special instructions regarding securing her dogs. The agent noted the air conditioner is under warranty and informed Jody that the team will contact her soon to schedule service.

The user, Onlay, called to request an estimate for HVAC and furnace replacement at their property in Saint Louis, Missouri. They provided detailed information about the issue, preferred a service visit the next day, and declined information about maintenance programs. The agent confirmed all details and assured follow-up from the team.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user repeating the agent's question. The call ended abruptly shortly after without any further interaction.

Eugenia called to request a callback regarding updating or replacing her dryer vent to fit a new washer and dryer. The agent confirmed the service details, scheduled a service appointment as soon as possible, and collected her contact and address information. Eugenia declined additional maintenance program information and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.
